micronaut/eh-ma-micronaut-apigateway/pom.general_idea: Update Maven properties to target Java 21 instead of Java 17.
micronaut/eh-ma-micronaut-apigateway/pom.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17 specifications, failing to utilize Java 21 features or comply with a Java 21 baseline requirement.

micronaut/eh-ma-micronaut-apigateway/pom.general_idea: Explicitly set the maven-compiler-plugin release version to 21.
micronaut/eh-ma-micronaut-apigateway/pom.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler may default to an older release version or rely on implicit settings, potentially resulting in bytecode incompatible with Java 21 or missing Java 21 language features.
